bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

user.description: The Grill ID can be found in the PitBoss app under the 'Edit Grill' section

more_info.description: Select your grill model and input your grill's password, if you have one set

data_description.model: The model is needed to properly communicate with your grill
data_description.password: The password for your grill, NOT your PitBoss account
data_description.protocol: The protocol to use to connect to your grill.

reconfigure.description: Select your grill model and input your grill's password, if you have one set

data_description.model: The model is needed to properly communicate with your grill
data_description.password: The password for your grill, NOT your PitBoss account
data_description.protocol: The protocol to use to connect to your grill.

data_description.temperature_unit: Override the temperature unit used by all PitBoss entities. 'Auto' uses the unit reported by the grill (set in the PitBoss app).
